explanation: This property ensures that upon the expiratory pause being set by the GUI and the system being in PCV or PSV mode, whenever the expiration phase ending, the inspiratory and expiratory valves will close, until the expiratory pause is stopped by the GUI.
decision1_substring: In PCV and PSV modes there shall be the possibility to initiate an Expiratory Pause if it is set by the GUI
decision2_substring: When the Expiratory Pause is set by the GUI, the ventilator shall wait for the end of the next expiration phase
decision3_substring: if the Expiratory Pause is still required, both the inspiratory and expiratory valves will close until the expiratory pause is stopped by the GUI.
output_structured_natural_language: upon expiratoryPauseButton & (PCVMode | PSVMode), whenever expiratoryPhaseEnd & expiratoryPause, until !expiratoryPauseButton, satisfy inValveClose & outValveClose
